title: Windy's Invisible Armors
description: Pack that makes every type of armor invisible!
body:
## 👘 Introduction

This pack makes every type of armor invisible.

Here is a [quick guide to how to install texture packs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I8BmnjowFrE) by GuideRealm.

No mods required.

## 👘 More Technical Packs

- [Invisible Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lnvisible-item-frames)

## 👘 Other Media

If you found a bug, or want to suggest your own idea you can chat with me about it on our [Discord]

You can support me or buy texture pack on the [Patreon]

Also check out my [PMC page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/WindyBee/)
